name: Vendr SaaS Procurement API
what_it_does: SaaS procurement and vendor management platform with API — managing software contracts, tracking renewals, negotiating SaaS prices using market benchmark data, automating procurement workflows (vendor onboarding, security reviews), and providing spend analytics for IT and finance teams.
use_cases: Querying active software contracts and renewal dates for procurement planning
Pulling vendor spend analytics by category for IT budget reporting
Integrating contract data with financial systems for accruals and cost allocation
Automating procurement workflow triggers (security reviews, legal review) via API
Monitoring SaaS price benchmarks for upcoming renewal negotiations
not_for: SaaS usage analytics and license utilization (use Zylo or Productiv for usage)
Shadow IT discovery and monitoring (use Torii for visibility)
Cloud IaaS procurement and cost management (use Apptio or Vantage)
best_when: An enterprise IT, finance, or procurement team wants to manage the full SaaS buying lifecycle — from vendor selection through contract negotiation using market pricing benchmarks to renewal management.
avoid_when: You need usage analytics, shadow IT discovery, or cloud infrastructure cost management rather than contract and procurement workflow management.

auth.notes: API key from Vendr account settings. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for contract events (renewal approaching, approval required, signed). ERP/accounting integrations (NetSuite, Sage Intacct) via native connectors. No OAuth2.

pricing.paid_tiers: Platform + professional services; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: Boston-based company. Founded 2019. Raised $100M Series B (2022). Backed by Tiger Global, Sound Ventures, Craft Ventures. Negotiation-as-a-service differentiator — Vendr buyers negotiate on customer's behalf using real purchase price benchmarks. SaaS pricing intelligence from 15,000+ contracts. Automated procurement workflows. Strong in Series B+ tech companies managing 50+ software vendors.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for vendors, contracts, renewals, and spend data. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Negotiation-as-a-service is human-driven — API manages data, not negotiation. Procurement workflows include approval routing configured in admin. Price benchmarks accessed via platform, not public API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contract reads fully idempotent. Vendor reads idempotent. Spend reads idempotent by period. Renewal reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Negotiation services are human-driven — not automated via API
Price benchmark data accessed via platform UI, not raw API endpoint
ERP integrations require separate connector configuration
Contract intake requires document upload — PDF processing is async
Annual contract — validate before API integration investment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Contract data includes pricing, legal terms, and vendor details — highly sensitive. Restrict API access to procurement team. ERP integration accesses financial data — implement least privilege. Tiger Global-backed company has investor security expectations.
